---
name: Chain Submission
about: Add a new chain to the registry
---

## Chain Submission

**Chain Name:** <!-- e.g., My Chain -->
**Label:** <!-- e.g., mychain -->
**Chain ID:** <!-- e.g., eip155:12345 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] File is named `data/chains/{label}.json`
- [ ] `label` field matches filename
- [ ] `chainId` is in CAIP-2 format (e.g., `eip155:1`)
- [ ] `interoperableAddressHex` is correctly encoded
- [ ] Images use `ipfs://` URLs (not HTTP gateway URLs)
- [ ] All URLs are valid and accessible

## Verification

<!-- How can we verify you represent this chain? -->
<!-- Options: link to official announcement, signed message, etc. -->

## Additional Context
